name: Configure Workstation Identity and Window Geometry
description: Modify the 'Engineering Final Exam 2026' configuration on the SEB Server (http://localhost:8080, credentials: super-admin / admin) to enforce a strict workstation environment. Set the Browser View Mode to 'Window', the Main Browser Window Width to 1280, and the Main Browser Window Height to 800. Append ' SEB_Lab3_Station' (including the leading space) to the User Agent and save the configuration.
